name: Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak MATZOS for 10 minutes and squeeze out excess water.
2. Cream butter and matzos until blended.
3. Mash yolks fine and add to the mixture.
4. Add sugar, salt, beaten eggs, lemon rind, and matzo meal.
5. Grease a pie pan and spread half of the mixture inside.
6. Arrange apples over the mixture.
7. Spread lemon juice, sugar mixture, and nuts on top.
8. Spread remaining dough over apples.
9. Bake for 30-40 minutes at 325 degrees F (160 degrees C).
